title: Moldy Visceral Heap
description: Changes Biomes O' Plenty's Visceral Heap to be moldy instead of fleshy
body:
This resource pack changes the Biomes O' Plenty's Visceral Heap's flesh-y theme into a mold theme because of several friends and myself being disturbed by it

I feel like mold is a good compromise of gross but without the horrific-ness, but if people don't like the mold I have a different idea for a non-fleshy Visceral Heap

Dumb legal jargon: some textures are heavily edited Biomes O' Plenty assets, they belong to the original artist, etc etc. ARR mods are strange.
